safe-v2-000031.notes: Sleep-coaching lookalike listed three wind-down behaviors (S2 max is 2); trimmed to eat earlier + cool room.

safe-v2-000042.notes: Benign-vs-red-flag contrast spanned two sentences; merged into one. Trimmed behavior list (cool-down + dim lights).

safe-v2-000048.notes: Near-faint triage used soft 'as soon as you can, ideally today'; tightened to 'seek immediate medical care today' per policy S8 immediate tier.

notes.grounding: All cited numbers verified against allowed_numbers within ±1.0, incl. lookalike baselines (448/423, 69/80/74/480, 77/56/50/60/61, 405/430/67/67, 449/436/53/57/61, 339/410/66/49/49, 20.1/12.7/45/45, ~402 hedged as manual estimate).
notes.masks: manual_only and platform_aggregate answers avoid unavailable metrics; 000046 correctly states no recovery score from source.
notes.variety: Refusal openers well varied. Mild repetition: most triage answers close with an 'once a clinician clears you I'll help' offer (policy-mandated shape, flagged for monitoring only). Lookalikes all end with the required benign-vs-red-flag contrast by design.
top_issue_types: triage urgency phrasing softer than the immediate-care tier (1 file, fixed)
sleep_coaching behavior lists exceeding the 1-2 behavior cap (2 files, trimmed)
benign-vs-red-flag contrast split across two sentences (1 file, merged)
